### Props

| Name      | Type     | Required | Default        | Description                                                                                                                                                    |
| --------- | -------- | -------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `message` | `string` |          | `'Loading...'` | Loading message displayed below the spinner. Plain string — the consuming app pre-translates if needed (this library never imports `t()` from a specific app). |
| `logoUrl` | `string` |          | `''`           | Optional logo image URL displayed above the spinner. Apps with custom branding can also override the `#logo` slot.                                             |

### Slots

| Name   | Bindings | Description |
| ------ | -------- | ----------- |
| `logo` | —        |             |
